Package org.apache.juneau.http.header

Class ContentType

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.http.header.HttpHeaderBean
org.apache.juneau.http.header.HttpMediaTypeHeader
org.apache.juneau.http.header.ContentType
All Implemented Interfaces:
HttpHeader
public class ContentType extends HttpMediaTypeHeader
Represents an HTTP Content-Type header.
Since:
9.2.1
